pages.title: Overview
pages.purpose: High-level introduction to the Zenon Go SDK: its purpose, architecture layers, key capabilities, and how to navigate the wiki. Links to child pages for setup and project status.

pages.title: Getting Started
pages.purpose: Step-by-step guide for installing the SDK, connecting to a Zenon node, creating a wallet, and sending a first transaction. Covers prerequisites, default connection URL, and the basic transaction lifecycle.

pages.title: Project Status and Roadmap
pages.purpose: Documents the current implementation status of all SDK modules (100% feature parity with Dart SDK), test coverage (568 tests), CI/CD pipeline, and planned future work from ROADMAP.md.

pages.title: Core Architecture
pages.purpose: Overview of the SDK's layered architecture: transport, API, embedded contracts, and utilities. Describes how the layers interact and links to child pages for each major subsystem.

pages.title: RPC Client and Connection Management
pages.purpose: Deep dive into rpc_client/client.go: the RpcClient struct, ClientOptions, WebsocketStatus state machine (Uninitialized/Connecting/Running/Stopped), auto-reconnect with exponential backoff, health monitoring, connection callbacks, and URL validation utilities.

pages.title: Transaction Lifecycle
pages.purpose: Explains the five-step pipeline for all state-changing operations: template creation, autofill (height/previousHash/momentumAcknowledged), Plasma/PoW resolution, signing, and broadcasting via PublishRawTransaction. References utils/block.go serialization and rpc_client internals.

pages.title: Ledger, Stats, and Subscription APIs
pages.purpose: Covers the api/ package: LedgerApi (GetFrontierMomentum, GetAccountInfoByAddress, PublishRawTransaction, PublishRawTransactionWithRetry), StatsApi, SubscriberApi (ToMomentums, ToAllAccountBlocks), and the SubscriptionManager for lifecycle management.

pages.title: Cryptographic Primitives
pages.purpose: Overview of the crypto/ package and its role as the foundation for all cryptographic operations in the SDK. Links to child pages for hashing/signing and key derivation.

pages.title: Hashing and Digital Signatures
pages.purpose: Documents crypto/crypto.go: Ed25519 Sign/Verify/GetPublicKey, SHA3-256 via DigestDefault, SHAKE256 for custom output sizes, and SHA-256 for legacy compatibility. Covers utils/hash.go HashDigest and HashDigestEmpty wrappers.

pages.title: Key Derivation and Argon2id
pages.purpose: Documents crypto/argon2.go: Argon2Parameters struct, DefaultArgon2Parameters (64MB memory, 1 iteration, 4 threads), DeriveKey and DeriveKeyDefault. Explains how these parameters are used for keystore encryption and why they were chosen for security.

pages.title: Wallet and Key Management
pages.purpose: Overview of the wallet/ package: HD wallet architecture, keystore file format, and secure memory handling. Links to child pages for key derivation and encrypted storage.

pages.title: HD Wallet: BIP39, BIP32, and KeyPair
pages.purpose: Covers wallet/mnemonic.go (BIP39 mnemonic generation/validation), wallet/bip32.go (master and child key derivation), wallet/derivation.go (BIP44 path m/44'/73404'/account'/0'/0'), and wallet/keypair.go (lazy public key derivation, address generation, Ed25519 signing, and the Destroy() secure zeroing pattern).

pages.title: KeyStore and Encrypted File Storage
pages.purpose: Documents wallet/keystore.go (KeyStore struct, NewKeyStoreRandom, NewKeyStoreFromMnemonic, GetKeyPair), wallet/encryptedfile.go (EncryptedFile/CryptoParams, AES-256-GCM encryption with Argon2id KDF, 0600 file permissions), wallet/manager.go (KeyStoreManager, CreateNew, SaveKeyStore, ReadKeyStore), and wallet/password.go validation.

pages.title: ABI Encoding and Embedded Contract Definitions
pages.purpose: Overview of the ABI system and the embedded/ package that defines contract ABIs. Links to child pages for the ABI engine and the contract definition layer.

pages.title: ABI Engine
pages.purpose: Deep dive into abi/abi.go: the Abi container, AbiFunction, Param, head/tail encoding pattern, EncodeArguments two-pass algorithm, DecodeList offset management, signature fingerprinting (FormatSignature, FingerprintSignature, 4-byte method selector), JSON parsing, and round-trip test patterns.
pages.parent: ABI Encoding and Embedded Contract Definitions

pages.title: Contract ABI Definitions and Constants
pages.purpose: Documents the embedded/ package: embedded/definitions.go (JSON ABI strings for all 11 contracts: Plasma, Pillar, Token, Sentinel, Swap, Stake, Accelerator, Bridge, Liquidity, HTLC, Spork), embedded/constants.go (GenesisTimestamp, CoinDecimals, OneZnn/OneQsr, minimum amounts for registration), and embedded/validations.go.
pages.parent: ABI Encoding and Embedded Contract Definitions

pages.title: Embedded Contract APIs
pages.purpose: Overview of the api/embedded/ package: how each embedded contract API wraps RPC calls and generates AccountBlock templates. Links to child pages grouped by contract category.

pages.title: Network Infrastructure Contracts: Pillar, Sentinel, and Spork
pages.purpose: Documents PillarApi (Register, RegisterLegacy, Revoke, UpdatePillar, Delegate, Undelegate, reward queries), SentinelApi (Register, Revoke, reward queries), and SporkApi (GetAll, admin-only activation). Covers pillar_types.go, sentinel_types.go, spork_types.go data structures.

pages.title: Token and Plasma Contracts
pages.purpose: Documents TokenApi (IssueToken, Mint, Burn, UpdateToken, GetByOwner, GetAll) and PlasmaApi (Fuse, CancelFuse, GetPlasmaByAddress, GetEntriesByAddress, GetRequiredPoWForAccountBlock). Covers token_types.go and plasma_types.go, including the JSON big.Int deserialization pattern.

pages.title: Staking, Accelerator, and HTLC Contracts
pages.purpose: Documents StakeApi (Stake, Cancel, CollectReward, GetEntriesByAddress), AcceleratorApi (CreateProject, AddPhase, UpdatePhase, Vote, Donate, GetAll), and HtlcApi (Create, Reclaim, Unlock, GetById). Covers stake_types.go, accelerator_types.go, htlc_types.go.

pages.title: Bridge, Liquidity, and Swap Contracts
pages.purpose: Documents BridgeApi (WrapToken, UnwrapToken, Redeem, Halt/Unhalt, SetTokenPair, NominateGuardians, TSS key management, time challenges), LiquidityApi, and SwapApi (legacy asset migration, GetSwapDecayPercentage, RetrieveAssets). Covers bridge_types.go, liquidity_types.go, swap_types.go.

pages.title: Proof-of-Work Generation
pages.purpose: Overview of the pow/ package and its role in the transaction lifecycle. Links to child pages for the PoW algorithm and worker pool.

pages.title: PoW Algorithm and Difficulty
pages.purpose: Documents pow/pow.go: GeneratePoW (synchronous), GeneratePowAsync (context-aware with cancellation), GeneratePowBigIntAsync, the SHA3-256 nonce search loop, MaxProtocolDifficulty (141,750,000) and MaxReasonableDifficulty (200,000,000) safety caps, and ErrDifficultyTooHigh DoS protection.

pages.title: Worker Pool and Concurrency
pages.purpose: Documents the workerPool semaphore pattern in pow/pow.go: DefaultMaxPoWWorkers (8), SetMaxPoWWorkers, POW_MAX_WORKERS environment variable override, acquire/release lifecycle, and how the pool prevents CPU exhaustion during concurrent transaction submission.

pages.title: Utilities
pages.purpose: Overview of the utils/ package: serialization helpers, hashing wrappers, and byte manipulation. Links to child pages for block utilities and general helpers.

pages.title: Block Serialization and Transaction Hashing
pages.purpose: Documents utils/block.go: GetTransactionBytes (306-byte deterministic serialization format), GetTransactionHash (SHA3-256 of serialized block, used for ID prediction of stakes/fusions/HTLCs), GetPoWData (SHA3-256 of address||previousHash), IsSendBlock/IsReceiveBlock type checkers, and block type constants.

pages.title: Hash and HashHeight Utilities
pages.purpose: Documents utils/hash.go (HashDigest, HashDigestEmpty wrappers around crypto.DigestDefault), utils/hash_height.go (HashHeight struct, NewHashHeight, GetBytes 40-byte serialization, IsEmpty, EmptyHashHeight), and utils/bytes.go (Merge, Uint64ToBytes, big.Int to 32-byte conversion).

pages.title: Testing and CI/CD
pages.purpose: Overview of the SDK's testing strategy (568 unit tests, golden tests, fuzz tests, example tests) and CI/CD pipeline. Links to child pages for test patterns and security tooling.

pages.title: Test Patterns and Golden Tests
pages.purpose: Documents the testing approach: round-trip encode/decode tests in abi_test.go, golden file tests (utils/block_golden_test.go, wallet/encryptedfile_golden_test.go) for protocol compatibility, fuzz tests (crypto_fuzz_test.go, wallet_fuzz_test.go), example tests for documentation, and integration tests in rpc_client/integration_test.go.

pages.title: CI/CD Pipeline and Security Scanning
pages.purpose: Documents .github/workflows/ci.yml (multi-platform builds: Linux/macOS/Windows, race detection, Go 1.18+ compatibility) and .github/workflows/security.yml (Gosec, Staticcheck, Govulncheck, Nancy dependency scanning). Explains how to run tests locally and interpret security scan results.
